temporal_description: A medium shot captures a dimly lit interrogation room. Three men are present. In the foreground, two men sit side-by-side at a large wooden table, their backs to the camera. One wears a blue shirt, and the other a white shirt. Across the table, a man in a light-colored, short-sleeved shirt and blue pants stands, looking down at them. At the far end of the table, a man in a suit and glasses sits, looking towards the standing man. A black briefcase rests on the table. The room is dark, with a cool, blueish light casting shadows. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the top right corner. The audio opens with a man speaking in a calm, declarative tone, stating, "原来那两个洋人是私家侦探" (So those two foreigners were private detectives). His voice is steady and matter-of-fact, as if making a significant discovery. Immediately following his words, a low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins. The camera cuts to a close-up of the man in the white shirt, now seen from the side. He has a serious, contemplative expression, with sweat glistening on his face. The background is completely dark, isolating him in the frame. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right. The music is atmospheric and tense, with a deep, resonant drone that creates a feeling of unease and anticipation, suggesting a serious or dramatic moment is unfolding. The shot changes to a close-up of a different man, who appears younger. He is on the phone, holding a black receiver to his ear. He wears a brown shirt and a silver watch on his left wrist. He looks down with a concerned and focused expression. The lighting is still dark and moody, with a cool, blueish tint. The "风行网" watermark is still present in the top right corner.
